chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Misc. Appl. No. S- 799 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 12.03.2025 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Abdul JabbarCharan, Advocate along with Applicant Learned Counsel for the applicant on instructions of applicant does not press this Cr. Misc. Application No. 799 of 2024 which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
